anomalies.description: Sudden 90% drop in death benefit value
anomalies.recommendation: Investigate policy adjustment or potential data entry error
Review rider charges and policy amendments
Verify payment method and contact policyholder

Visualize your dream home with Birla Opus shades! 


--- Page 2 ---
Colour Snap is a visual photography service offered by Birla Opus 
Paints. Our goal is to present you with the ideal colour choices 
tailored to your home architecture and your personal colour 
preferences. We genuinely hope this assists you in bringing your 
dream home come to life with stunning hues.  
 
Hello! 
Mr. MOHAMMAD SAMEER ARFAT MOHAMMAD SHABBIR

--- Page 11 ---
OUR FAVOURITES 
Some popular colour collections 
Whites and Off-Whites bring timeless elegance to your home, creating a serene 
atmosphere. Versatile and clean, they suit various décor styles.   
 
Grey is a neutral color that sits between black and white on the color spectrum. It's 
often associated with qualities like balance, neutrality, sophistication, and practicality. 
 
From sea pebble grey to sandy beach brown, our earthy hues create a calming escape. 
Pair Frozen Waterfall and Terra Brown effortlessly with beige, blue, or green for 
versatile charm.  
10 


--- Page 12 ---
Warm Whites 
Brighten up your spaces and create the perfect background for home décor with our 6 
favorite Birla Opus warm whites. 
Clean White 
Yellowish White 
Grayish White 
Pale Yellowish Pink 
Pinkish White 
Pale Yellow Green

--- Page 13 ---

--- Page 15 ---

favorite Birla Opus greys.  
Greys 
Yellowish Gray 
White 
Pinkish Gray 
Very Pale Blue

14 


--- Page 16 ---
15 
Colour Tip 
•
Darker or accent colours may need multiple 
coats—use high-quality, high-hiding paint for 
better coverage and faster results.  
 
•
Paint colours often appear half a shade darker 
on walls than on chips—when unsure, 
choose the lighter shade.  
 
•
Colours can vary on screens—always check 
a physical swatch and test the shade in your 
space before finalizing.  


--- Page 17 ---
Happy 
Painting 
 
For consumer queries/complaints: 
 
Toll-free number – 1800 120 1234 
Customer Support Email ID – opuscare@adityabirla.com 
Website – www.birlaopus.com 
 
16
